dashboardSubtitle: Here's a quick overview of your personal skin health companion.
advancedAiAnalysisDesc: Get a detailed risk assessment of your skin lesions with our state-of-the-art AI, powered by a specialized Bio-LLM.
newSkinAnalysisDesc: Upload an image to get an AI-powered risk assessment.
askBioLLMDesc: Have a question? Our medical AI can help.
uvEnvironmentDesc: Check real-time skin risk score based on your location.
dermatologyDigitalTwinDesc: View a virtual model of your skin's health over time.

pageHeader.title: Skin Lesion Analysis
pageHeader.subtitle: Upload an image to get an AI-powered risk assessment.

upload.title: Upload Your Image
upload.description: Click below to select a photo of a skin lesion.
upload.fileTypes: Supports JPEG, PNG, WEBP. For educational purposes only.

results.title: Analysis Results
results.description: AI-powered assessment of the provided image.
results.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This is an AI-generated assessment for educational purposes and is not a medical diagnosis. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional.

questionnaire.title: Diagnostic Questionnaire
questionnaire.description: Answer these questions to help the AI refine its assessment.
questionnaire.durationLabel: How long has the lesion been present?

analysis.generateAudioPrompt: Click the button to generate an audio read-aloud of the analysis.

toast.analysisFailedDesc: Could not generate AI explanation. Please try again.
toast.assessmentRefinedDesc: Your risk assessment has been updated based on your answers.
toast.refinementFailedDesc: Could not refine the assessment. Please try again.

pageHeader.title: Ask Our Medical Bio-LLM
pageHeader.subtitle: Get answers to your dermatology questions from our specialized AI.

emptyState.title: Ask a question to start the conversation.
emptyState.example: e.g., "What are the common symptoms of eczema?"

toast.errorDesc: Failed to get a response from the AI. Please try again.

pageHeader.title: Dermatology Digital Twin
pageHeader.subtitle: A virtual model of your skin that updates with every scan.

evolutionCard.title: Lesion Evolution & Sun Damage
evolutionCard.description: Shows sun damage accumulation and predicted future appearance.

pageHeader.title: Genetic Risk Analyzer
pageHeader.subtitle: Predict your genetic melanoma susceptibility using a Bayesian risk model.

formCard.title: Your Information
formCard.description: This data is used to calculate your risk score.

skinTypes.V: Type V (Dark brown, very rarely burns)

resultCard.title: Analysis Result
resultCard.description: Your predicted genetic risk for melanoma.
resultCard.disclaimer: This is a prediction based on statistical models and not a formal diagnosis. Consult a healthcare provider for a comprehensive evaluation.
resultCard.prefix: Your predicted genetic melanoma susceptibility is:

pageHeader.title: Personalized Recommendations
pageHeader.subtitle: Fill out the form below to get AI-tailored hygiene and lifestyle tips.

detailsCard.title: Your Details
detailsCard.description: Provide some information for a tailored experience.

planCard.title: Your Personalized Plan
planCard.description: Here are the AI-generated tips based on your profile.

toast.failedDesc: Could not generate recommendations. Please try again.

pageHeader.title: Tele-Derm Hub
pageHeader.subtitle: Find and connect with verified dermatologists from around the world.

teleDerm.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, specialty, or country...

pageHeader.title: Onco-Connect Triage System
pageHeader.subtitle: Your bridge between AI analysis and professional medical care.

referralCard.title: Digital Referral Card
referralCard.description: Show this to a healthcare professional for a quick summary of your analysis.

map.title: Nearby Verified Oncology Centers
map.description: Enter your location to find verified centers near you.
map.searchPlaceholder: e.g., your city or zip code

pageHeader.title: UV & Environment Risk
pageHeader.subtitle: Get a real-time skin risk score for your location.

recommendations.lagos: Spend less than 8 minutes in direct sunlight. Apply SPF 30+ every 2 hours.
recommendations.kabul: Spend 10-15 minutes in direct sunlight. Apply SPF 30+.
recommendations.nairobi: Limit sun exposure between 10 a.m. and 4 p.m. Wear protective clothing.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Enter your email below to login to your account.

toast.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
toast.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Enter your email below to create your account.

toast.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
toast.emailInUse: This email is already in use. Please try another one.
